metadata.description: A person in their late 20s to early 30s, presenting as male, has fair skin with a smooth texture, showing some subtle redness on the cheeks. Their face is oval with a defined jawline. The hair is short, straight, and blonde, styled with a side part and swept to the right, revealing a slightly receding hairline at the temples. The eyes are dark brown, almond-shaped, and set slightly wide apart. Eyebrows are medium thick and straight. The nose is straight with a rounded tip and a narrow bridge. Lips are medium thickness with a well-defined cupid's bow. A light stubble covers the jawline and chin. The person has a neutral expression, looking directly forward with a level head angle.
metadata.anchor: Blonde hair and dark brown eyes.
